headline: DBS Named World's Best AI Bank
the_so_what: 1,500 models across 370 use cases is an infrastructure number, not a marketing one. Most global banks publicly reference a handful of AI initiatives; DBS is reporting an order of magnitude more. The iCoach tool for internal career planning is telling: AI spending has moved past client-facing revenue lines into workforce operations, which only happens when a bank treats AI as core infrastructure rather than a product feature.
summary: DBS won the inaugural World's Best AI Bank award from Global Finance's AI In Finance Awards 2025. The bank operates 1,500+ AI models deployed across 370+ use cases. Specific capabilities include hyper-personalized investment nudges, AI-driven fraud protection, relationship manager insights tools, and iCoach, a generative AI system for employee career planning. DBS also won Best Corporate/Institutional AI Bank and Best Enhanced Customer Experience at the same ceremony. This marks the second consecutive year DBS has won Global Finance's Digital Bank Awards.

key_stat.label: AI models across 370+ use cases in production
